questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: Which of the following is NOT a feature of the proposed Gaza Peace Plan (Trump’s twenty-point plan) as described in the recent developments?

options.text: Resolution of future disputes through diplomatic engagement
Immediate integration of Gaza into the Israeli sovereign territory

questions.explanation: The plan focuses on disarmament, international supervision for reconstruction, and diplomatic resolution of disputes. It does not propose the immediate integration of Gaza into Israeli sovereign territory; rather, it envisions a structured peace and reconstruction process.
questions.takeaway: Peace plans for Gaza typically involve disarmament and international oversight rather than direct territorial annexation.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Peace plan declares that future disputes will be resolved via diplomatic engagement and negotiation... Plan calls for Hamas’s disarmament and an internationally supervised reconstruction of Gaza.
